name: vwap_bounce
description: Trade intraday VWAP rejection bounces in the direction of the broader EMA bias.
entry_rules: Require price to be on the correct side of the EMA bias
Wait for price to sweep through VWAP and then reclaim it with a rejection wick
Require current candle volume to be above the rolling average by the configured multiplier
exit_rules: Do not re-enter repeatedly if VWAP reclaim keeps failing
research_notes: This is the closest clean adaptation of the user's trend plus VWAP bounce idea using only OHLCV candles.
Best used in practice mode before considering any live rollout.
